{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Imperial cloudship
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Imperial cloudship]] is a hundred paces long and forty wide with three levels.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Imperial cloudship]] features five scripted tubes on its back that function as propulsion.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
